description: You are a Digital Design Engineer documenting a circuit. Create a gate-level schematic of a 1-bit Full Adder in Diagrams.net (draw.io) based on the specification provided in '~/Desktop/full_adder_spec.txt'. Use the 'Two Half-Adders' topology with inputs A, B, and Cin, and outputs Sum and Cout. The circuit must utilize 2 XOR gates, 2 AND gates, and 1 OR gate to implement the logic: Sum = (A XOR B) XOR Cin and Cout = (A AND B) OR (Cin AND (A XOR B)). Include text labels for all input and output terminals. Save the diagram as '~/Diagrams/full_adder.drawio' and export it as a PNG image to '~/Diagrams/exports/full_adder.png'.
